(There is nothing to do on this side.)

"...I don't like it. Why are you at this school?"
“Is it your fault that the entrance is dirty?
``Isn't the entrance getting more dirty? The janitor is also disgusting.
Please clean it up when you notice it. ”
“Hey, go ahead and clean it up.
There's a liquid leak at the entrance. ”
"I'm sure you're on cleaning duty, right?
No? There's no difference. Clean this whole school. ”
Isn't it called ``chee cow'' instead of ``otaku''? ”
``Everywhere around the entrance has been wet since yesterday...
That janitor isn't working, is he? ”
It's not water, but... like salt water? ”
"That janitor doesn't clean the school anymore.
I wonder if he's acting like a fool... ”
``I see, the janitor isn't coming today.
It was peaceful, but the school was so dirty. ”
